prompt#0: A scientific illustration of a Dual Recurrent Attention Unit architecture for Visual Question Answering. A split composition: left side shows a neural network processing a question text, with recurrent layers generating a shimmering, semi-transparent textual attention heatmap. Right side shows a convolutional network processing a natural image, with recurrent layers generating a corresponding visual attention heatmap that highlights specific objects. A central joint embedding space fuses these features, with glowing, bidirectional data streams connecting the two sides, illustrating relational reasoning. Clean, technical diagram style with a blue and orange color palette, sharp lines, and subtle grid background. A4 size, top-down schematic view.
